content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 10 (N:10):

- Atom H:22 (hydrogen) - directly bonded to N:10
- Atom S:7 (sulfur) - directly bonded to N:10  
- Atom C:11 (carbon) - directly bonded to N:10

From the image, I can clearly see that nitrogen atom 10 is connected to three atoms: a hydrogen atom (22), a sulfur atom (7), and a carbon atom (11). These are all covalently bonded to the nitrogen atom.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 5731, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_5731.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 10 (N) are:
- Atomic index 22, element H
- Atomic index 7, element S  
- Atomic index 11, element C

Geomconf_index: 5731

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
